name: rox
description: Access Rox revenue agents, account intelligence, and sales workflow automation from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Use Rox revenue agents and account intelligence from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Rox connects Codex to revenue agent workflows for account intelligence, prospecting, CRM context, recommended actions, and sales workflow automation.
defaultPrompt: Find Rox account insights for this customer and summarize recommended next actions.
Use Rox to identify high-priority accounts with recent buying signals.
Draft a follow-up plan from Rox account activity and meeting context.
